Package org.episteme.core.mathematics.linearalgebra.algorithms

package org.episteme.core.mathematics.linearalgebra.algorithms
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.episteme.core.mathematics.linearalgebra
     
  • Class
    Description
    Distributed25DAlgorithm
    Implementation of the 2.5D Matrix Multiplication Algorithm.
    DistributedCannonAlgorithm
    Implementation of Cannon's Algorithm for distributed matrix multiplication.
    DistributedCARMAAlgorithm
    Implementation of the Communication-Avoiding Recursive Matrix Multiplication (CARMA) Algorithm.
    DistributedFoxAlgorithm
    Fox's Algorithm for distributed matrix multiplication.
    DistributedSUMMAAlgorithm
    Distributed implementation of the SUMMA (Scalable Universal Matrix Multiplication Algorithm).
    MatrixMultiplicationPlanner
    Intelligent Planner for Distributed Matrix Multiplication.
    MatrixMultiplicationPlanner.Algorithm
     
    RealCARMAAlgorithm
    Implementation of the CARMA (Communication-Avoidant Recursive Matrix Multiplication) Algorithm for the generic Real type.
    RealDoubleCARMAAlgorithm
    Implementation of the CARMA Algorithm specialized for the double primitive type.
    RealDoubleStrassenAlgorithm
    Implementation of the Strassen Algorithm specialized for the double primitive type.
    RealStrassenAlgorithm
    Implementation of the Strassen Algorithm for matrix multiplication for the generic Real type.
